ops.text: Phase 0 hygiene DONE. Auditor re-run (seed 2, v6): golden 57/57, precision .898 (seed-1 baseline .958; within binomial noise at n~49, boundary-category disagreements only — operational_directive/question vs wrong_approach, no systematic pattern), contamination .061 (improved from .102, upper .151), recall_hat .983, 17 disagreements. Auto-sync pushed to yasyf/cc-steer-traces (traces 4416, sft 3525, dpo 543, kto 4416) — HF write token confirmed working. Stats spot-check matches: 4416 total / 3525 accepted (80%) / v6. Corpus is sound to train on.
